system_identity.name: DJZS Autonomous System
system_identity.description: Adversarial Logic Layer for the A2A economy. Machine-to-machine audit oracle with deterministic ProofOfLogic certificates.

integration_channels.name: dark_channel
integration_channels.description: Alpha protection for proprietary trading agents. End-to-end encrypted via MLS. Agent DMs the Oracle, gets verdict privately. Zero public trace. Use case: algorithmic arb bots, proprietary strategies.

integration_channels.name: light_channel
integration_channels.description: Public provenance for DAO treasury bots. x402-gated audits with Irys Datachain certificates. Every decision permanently on-chain. Use case: DAO treasury management, public accountability.

capabilities.name: micro_zone_audit
capabilities.description: High-frequency operational ledger and sanity check. Binary risk scoring.

expected_payload.agent_id: string (optional) - wallet address or XMTP identity for reputation tracking
expected_payload.trade_params: object (optional) - structured trade parameters for cross-referencing against strategy_memo

capabilities.name: founder_zone_audit
capabilities.description: Strategic roadmap diligence. Detects narrative drift and confirmation bias.

expected_payload.agent_id: string (optional) - wallet address or XMTP identity

capabilities.name: treasury_zone_audit
capabilities.description: Exhaustive adversarial stress-test for capital deployment proposals.

expected_payload.agent_id: string (optional) - wallet address or XMTP identity

capabilities.name: intelligence_brief
capabilities.description: Pre-flight intelligence analysis. Submit your current memo and historical data to receive a structured brief with 5 adversarial signals: bias patterns, narrative drift, assumption extraction, volatility stress tests, and emotional spike detection. Returns an intelligence_context string you can inject into audit requests for deeper analysis. No payment required.

expected_payload.current_memo: string (required, min 20 chars) — the strategy memo to analyze

history.audits: [{risk_score: number, primary_bias_detected: string, timestamp: string}] (optional, max 50)

logic_failure_taxonomy.DJZS-S01: CIRCULAR_LOGIC — Conclusion used as premise. Self-referencing loop.
logic_failure_taxonomy.DJZS-S02: MISSING_FALSIFIABILITY — No failure condition. Unfalsifiable thesis.
logic_failure_taxonomy.DJZS-E01: CONFIRMATION_TUNNEL — Asymmetric evidence. Only confirming data cited.
logic_failure_taxonomy.DJZS-E02: AUTHORITY_SUBSTITUTION — Depends on reputation, not structural evidence.
logic_failure_taxonomy.DJZS-I02: NARRATIVE_DEPENDENCY — Strategy survives only if narrative holds. No hedge.
logic_failure_taxonomy.DJZS-X01: UNHEDGED_EXECUTION — No fallback. Single point of failure.

response_schema.description: Proof of Logic Certificate — standardized audit response. Binary PASS/FAIL verdict with deterministic failure codes for autonomous agent error handling.

risk_score.description: Scores above 60 trigger FAIL. Above 80 = narrative drift or slippage blindness.

verdict.description: Binary go/no-go. CRITICAL/HIGH flags = automatic FAIL.

flags.description: Machine-readable logic rupture codes. CRITICAL/HIGH = abort execution.

cryptographic_hash.description: SHA-256 commitment to reasoning trace. Required for downstream smart contract execution.
